particulars.description: Land. See clause 5.1 (fixed charge over real property) of the debenture which creates a fixed charge over the company’s rights, title and interest from time to time in and to all its real property (as defined in the debenture) and all related rights (as defined in the debenture), including the below listed properties:. Owner property description title number freehold or leasehold. 7 steel (properties) limited allied steel limited, castle works, east moors road, cardiff. WA39831 freehold. 7 steel (properties) limited land and buildings lying to the south of willows avenue, cardiff WA42214 freehold. 7 steel (properties) limited ocean park, nettlefold road, cardiff CYM730526 freehold. 7 steel (properties) limited land at castle works more particularly demised on the filed plan WA589330 WA589330 freehold. Please see schedule 2 (specified property) of the debenture which includes details of further real property of the company the subject of a fixed charge under the debenture.. Intellectual property. See clause 5.9 (fixed charge over intellectual property) of the debenture which creates a fixed charge of the company’s rights, title and interest from time to time in and to its intellectual property (as defined in the debenture) and all related rights (as defined in the debenture).

The mortgaged property for celsa (wales) limited being: allied steel limited, castle works, east moors road, cardiff and title number WA39831; land and buildings lying to the south of willows avenue, cardiff and title number WA42214 and other mortgaged property specified in the instrument. For more details please refer to the instrument.
